en.extract:
The pale-billed hornbill (Lophoceros pallidirostris) is a species of hornbill in the family Bucerotidae. It is found in Angola, DRC, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Tanzania, and Zambia.

The '''pale-billed hornbill''' ('''''Lophoceros pallidirostris''''') is a species of [[hornbill]] in the family [[Bucerotidae]]. It is found in [[Angola]], [[Democratic Republic of the Congo|DRC]], [[Kenya]], [[Malawi]], [[Mozambique]], [[Tanzania]], and [[Zambia]].
